race.comment: TWO MINDS (1) is resuming from a spell of 11 months and having his first run for the Billy Healey yard. Was in the placings on debut last campaign at this track over 1100m. Will be forward for this after a recent trial win at Doomben and rates a key runner while fresh. FUNDORA (2) will find this a little easier than his third on debut nine days ago, beaten 1.1 lengths at the end of 1350m at Warwick. Promising type with improvement to come so he should pay to follow. TOO DARN SMART (11) finished seventh at his latest appearance over 1400m at Gatton. Ready to peak now third-up and is a solid top-three chance on best figures. RUN TO YOU (9) turned in a bold run first-up when she tried to lead throughout but faded and finished fourth, beaten 1.5 lengths at this circuit. Has ability and a bold showing is expected.
